positive: Minimalist abstract fox silhouette amidst stylized geometric mountain peaks and clean celestial constellations, highly detailed line art on a solid cream background. The fox should be gracefully leaping, looking vibrant and adventurous. Use a limited palette of deep indigo blue, burnt orange, and crisp white. Composition must be perfectly centered for apparel print placement, emphasizing strong contrast and clean edges. Style: Mid-century modern graphic design, vector illustration, woodcut print aesthetic, highly symmetrical. Lighting: Studio lighting, crisp and flat. Print-ready, suitable for DTG printing.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, trademark, dirty, messy, grayscale, poor anatomy, extra limbs, mutated, low resolution, photorealistic, signature
